claims.claim_text: CCI はコカ・コーラ社のフランチャイズ権による独占的ブランドポートフォリオ（コカ・コーラ、ファンタ、スプライト等）を保有し、競合が同等のブランド力を構築できない参入障壁を持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2013 Prepared Remarks (CEO): 'We will keep leveraging the strength of our portfolio of brands to lead the growth in all categories we operate in.' / Q4 2014 Prepared Remarks (CEO): 'Coca-Cola brand is the #1 cola brand in Pakistan.' / 'Our strong brand portfolio, geographic footprint and our great people will continue to provide healthy top line and profitability growth'
claims.speaker: CEO (Burak Basarir)

claims.claim_text: フロンティア市場（パキスタン、イラク、カザフスタン）における独占的ボトリング権と実績ある流通・実行能力により、後発競合が模倣困難なポジションを確立している
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q1 2014 Prepared Remarks (CEO): 'CCI has an unmatched growth story in the frontier markets and growth potential in Turkey.' / Pakistan posted 17% volume growth despite devastating floods. CCI led industry growth with market share from 31% in 2013 to 35% in 2014. Iraq: market share in Sparkling increased from 22% to 29% in 2014.
claims.speaker: CEO (Burak Basarir)

claims.claim_text: 戦略的調達（ヘッジ・プレバイ）により主要原材料コストを競合比安定させる調達能力を持ち、これがコスト構造の優位性につながっている
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q1 2014 CFO: 'We have currently hedged about 98% close to full of our sugar requirements for 2014, that is exclusive of Turkey. We have actually fixed almost half of our aluminum needs for 2014, and for resin, we've prebought roughly half of our requirements for the year.' / Q4 2014 CFO: 'For sugar, basically, we've hedged over 90% of our requirements for 2015.'
claims.speaker: CFO (Nusret Kostem)

claims.claim_text: パキスタンにおける製造能力拡張（マルタン、カラチ、イスラマバードの新規グリーンフィールド工場）が、旺盛な需要に応える構造的スケールアップを可能にしている
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Prepared Remarks (CEO): 'In Pakistan, we are planning to open greenfield plants Multan, Islamabad and Karachi between 2015 and 17.' / Q1 2015: New facilities in Multan, Kazakhstan (Astana), and Dushanbe (Tajikistan) planned to be operational in Q2 2015.
claims.speaker: CEO (Burak Basarir)

claims.claim_text: トルコにおける即時消費（IC）パッケージへの戦略的シフトが、1回あたりのトランザクション増加と長期的な収益性向上につながる構造的改善を実現している
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 Prepared Remarks (CEO): 'In line with our long-term strategy, transitions towards immediate consumption packages in the sparkling category continued in Turkey... Number of transactions for both sparkling and total business have increased in the 9 months.' / 'Although this brings slower total unit case volume growth in the short-term, but this strategy will help us to add new consumer base into our franchise and also continue improving our profitability in the long term.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Burak Basarir)

claims.claim_text: カザフスタンにおける高EBITDA（20%超）を実現する市場ポジションと実行力が、新興国ボトリング事業としての規模の経済を示している
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 CFO: 'In Central Asia, we're looking at margins over 20% levels basically.' / Q4 2013: 'Kazakhstan, grew by 24%, while all categories posted market share gains. Brand Coke grew 60%, hence, our sparkling market share in Kazakhstan posted strong 6.1% increase, reaching 48% in 2013.' / Kazakhstan delivered 19% volume growth in 2014 despite devaluation.
claims.speaker: CFO (Nusret Kostem)

claims.claim_text: コカ・コーラ社との関係性（ボトリングパートナーシップ）により、グローバルブランドマーケティング・製品イノベーション（コカ・コーラ・ゼロ、フュースティー等）へのアクセスが可能で、競合ローカルボトラーが模倣できない独自リソースを持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2013 CEO: 'brand Coke features 200 most popular names on the both IC and HC packages. Connect promotion brought high advantage and significantly increased our brand equity scores.' / Coca-Cola Zero grew almost 50% in 2014. Fuse Tea delivered over 50% volume growth. New product launches aligned with global Coca-Cola Company pipeline.
claims.speaker: CEO (Burak Basarir)

claims.claim_text: 中東・中央アジアでの事業ポートフォリオ分散（パキスタン21%、カザフスタン9%、イラク9%）が、単一市場依存リスクを低減しつつ成長を持続させる地理的多様化優位性を生んでいる
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q1 2015 CEO: 'International sales volume now account about 49% of our total volume compared to 46% a year ago. International sales contribution is led by Pakistan at 21%; Iraq 9%; and Kazakhstan 9%.' / CFO: 'our business in CCI, which roughly, in volume, revenue and a profitability perspective, is contributed roughly about 55% by our Turkish business and 45% by our International businesses.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Burak Basarir)

claims.claim_text: パキスタンのEBITDAマージンを2012年の11%から2014年には15%へ改善し、かつ市場シェアを31%から35%へ拡大した実行能力は、新興市場参入・拡大の独自ノウハウを示している
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 CFO: 'In Pakistan, I think it won't be, let's say, a -- it's going to be unfair to expect those margins to migrate towards higher teens, and that's the outlook.' / Q1 2015 CEO: 'We led industry growth with a market share increase from 31% in 2013 to 35% in 2014.' CFO at Q4 2014: 'at the time of our acquisition...margins in Pakistan was about 11-ish, which has moved to now mid-teen, 15-ish.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Burak Basarir) / CFO (Nusret Kostem)

claims.claim_text: トルコ国内での相対的低価格戦略（インフレ以下の価格設定）による消費者浸透率の維持が、長期的なカテゴリーリーダーシップを支えるブランド価値の擁護につながっている
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 CFO: 'this year was a special year because we wanted to maintain our consumer base without taking any price increase, so we wanted to keep our prices flat. And that was a conscious decision on our part.' / CEO: 'In response to retail consumers sentiment, we cautiously maintained our focus on providing value to our consumers to ensure healthy long-term category growth.'
claims.speaker: CEO / CFO
